brief_justification: Arrives at the exact correct answer ($375) using the valid DWL triangle formula; only applies the surface formula without explaining why DWL forms a triangle or tracing welfare distribution effects; no reflection on reasoning method or assumptions made; no sanity check, counterfactual, or re-derivation from supply/demand curves directly; presents the answer as certain with no acknowledgment of assumptions (e.g., linearity, no other distortions); considers only the standard triangle formula with no mention of alternative calculation approaches; shows the arithmetic chain clearly enough to reproduce but omits the geometric derivation justifying the formula's applicability.
